system.powerDescription:
A precise, pressurized stream of water shoots from your hands. This jet of water is silent, extends up to CAT+2 range away from you, and is able to slice through substances as hard as concrete and steel with little difficulty. When you use this power, roll PSYCHE and answer the following questions, gaining +1D for each 'yes' answer. 

• Can you concentrate the beam on a single target? 
• Is this attack a surprise?
